message:
fix(abi): use libc::gid_t in group_member, make auxv parsing word-size portable, and add h_errno conformance tests

group_member was using u32 for the getgroups syscall buffer instead of
libc::gid_t, which could cause misalignment on platforms where gid_t differs.
Also passes null_mut::<libc::gid_t>() for the initial count query.

runtime_page_size auxv parsing was hardcoded to 8-byte offsets (assuming
64-bit). Now derives entry_size and field offsets from size_of::<usize>(),
making the parser correct on both 32-bit and 64-bit targets.

Adds two new resolv conformance tests verifying that gethostbyname and
gethostbyaddr set thread-local h_errno to HOST_NOT_FOUND on lookup failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
